title: DevStories Configuration
description: Configuration for DevStories VS Code extension

idMode.description: ID generation mode: 'auto' generates sequential IDs, 'manual' requires user input

story.description: Prefix for story IDs (e.g., DS, STORY)

idPrefix.description: ID prefixes for epics and stories

isCompletion.description: When true, stories with this status count as completed in progress calculations. If no status has this flag, the last status in the array is used.

isExcluded.description: When true, stories with this status are excluded from burndown calculations (e.g., cancelled, deferred).

current.description: Current active sprint name (must exist in sequence if sequence is defined)

length.description: Number of days in each sprint (used for burndown charts)

firstSprintStartDate.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the first sprint in the sequence (used to derive all sprint date ranges)

storypoints.description: Story point values parallel to sizes array (index-aligned). Used for progress calculation in the status bar.

defaultToCurrentSprint.description: When true, quick captures use current sprint; when false, they go to backlog

autoFilterCurrentSprint.description: When true, automatically filter to current sprint on extension load

enabled.description: When true, maintains a hierarchy of document folders mirroring the breakdown tree view

root.description: Root folder for storydocs, relative to the repository root (e.g., 'docs/storydocs')

storydocs.description: StoryDocs: hierarchical document folders mirroring the breakdown tree view
